response.justification: While Bogdan has 20 years of solid software engineering experience and demonstrates strong technical fundamentals (TDD, infrastructure, broad stack knowledge), he lacks the specialized AI expertise and strategic experience required for a Director-level Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy. His recent MCP tooling work at re:cinq is infrastructure-adjacent to AI but doesn't demonstrate the deep AI/ML expertise, recognized thought leadership, or strategic customer advisory experience the role demands. His generalist approach and lack of a demonstrated AI platform or product represent significant gaps.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 20 years of software engineering and multiple staff-level roles demonstrating technical depth
Strong software craftsmanship foundation with proven commitment to TDD, CI/CD, and clean architecture across diverse domains
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP code generators, agent frameworks at re:cinq) shows awareness of AI trends and capacity to learn quickly in new domains
concerns: Lacks demonstrated AI/ML expertise and any shipped products or platforms built with AI—critical for an AI strategy role
No evidence of strategic advisory experience with customers or partners on technology adoption or cloud/AI platform decisions
Generalist background with frequent job changes (4 roles in 4.5 years) conflicts with need for specialized, deep expertise in AI strategy; also missing preferred Master's/PhD in AI field

key_factors.factor: Absence of AI/ML expertise and demonstrated products
Strong core software engineering foundation and infrastructure knowledge
Lack of strategic/director-level leadership and customer advisory experience
